result.stdout:
Azure Storage CLI Tool

Usage: azure-cli [options] [command]

Options:
  -h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  download   Download file from Azure Storage
  list       List of containers
  login      Login to Azure Storage
  upload     Upload file to Azure Storage

Run 'azure-cli [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Azure Storage CLI Tool

Usage: azure-cli [options] [command]

Options:
  -h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  download   Download file from Azure Storage
  list       List of containers
  login      Login to Azure Storage
  upload     Upload file to Azure Storage

Run 'azure-cli [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Download file from Azure Storage

Usage: azure-cli download [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  blobName       Blob file name
  containerName  Container Name
  filePath       Download target file path

Options:
  -h|--help      Show help information
  -n|--name      Choose different account

result.stdout:
Upload file to Azure Storage

Usage: azure-cli upload [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  filePath       Upload file path
  containerName  Container Name

Options:
  -h|--help      Show help information
  -n|--name      Choose different account
  --public       Set access level
